emails.subject: Allegheny Energy Supply Company LLC ("AESC")
emails.body: Allegheny Energy Supply Company LLC ("AESC") All: We sent this ISDA for execution and now the lawyer has come back with MORE CHANGES. The primary issue is SETOFF. AESC originally accepted our standard setoff language and has now rejected affiliate setoff due to "regulatory" issues. Who is currently responsible for this counterparty? Please respond. Thanks for your help. Sara Shackleton Enron Wholesale Services 1400 Smith Street, EB3801a Houston, TX 77002 Ph: (713) 853-5620 Fax: (713) 646-3490

emails.subject: RE: Allegheny Energy Supply Company LLC ("AESC")
emails.body: RE: Allegheny Energy Supply Company LLC ("AESC") it would be me. let me ponder and respond shortly. thanks, tracy

emails.subject: RE: Allegheny Energy Supply Company LLC ("AESC")
emails.body: Tracy: Please let us know when you have reached a conclusion. Thanks. Sara
